001import java.util.Stack;
002
003/**
004 * Represents the player in the game.
005 * Stores the player's current room and navigation history.
006 *
007 * @author Raphaël Quillaud
008 * @version 2026.05.09
009 */
010public class Player {
011    private String aName;
012    private Room aCurrentRoom;
013    private Stack<Room> aPreviousRooms;
014    private ItemList aItems;
015    private int aMaxWeight;
016    private int aCurrentWeight;
017
018    /**
019     * Constructor for Player.
020     * @param pName the player's name
021     * @param pStartRoom the room where the player starts
022     * @param pMaxWeight the maximum weight the player can carry
023     */
024    public Player(final String pName, final Room pStartRoom, final int pMaxWeight) {
025        this.aName = pName;
026        this.aCurrentRoom = pStartRoom;
027        this.aPreviousRooms = new Stack<Room>();
028        this.aItems = new ItemList();
029        this.aMaxWeight = pMaxWeight;
030        this.aCurrentWeight = 0;
031    }
032
033    /**
034     * Returns the player's name.
035     * @return the name of the player
036     */
037    public String getName() {
038        return this.aName;
039    }
040
041    /**
042     * Returns the current room of the player.
043     * @return the current Room object
044     */
045    public Room getCurrentRoom() {
046        return this.aCurrentRoom;
047    }
048
049    /**
050     * Moves the player to the given room and saves the previous one.
051     * Does nothing if pRoom is null.
052     *
053     * @param pRoom the room to move to
054     */
055    public void goTo(final Room pRoom) {
056        if (pRoom == null) return;
057        this.aPreviousRooms.push(this.aCurrentRoom);
058        this.aCurrentRoom = pRoom;
059    }
060
061    /**
062     * Moves the player back to the previous room.
063     * Returns false if there is no previous room.
064     *
065     * @return true if the player moved back, false otherwise
066     */
067    public boolean goBack() {
068        if (this.aPreviousRooms.empty()) return false;
069        this.aCurrentRoom = this.aPreviousRooms.pop();
070        return true;
071    }
072
073    /**
074     * Returns true if the player is carrying the item with the given name.
075     * @param pName the name of the item to check
076     * @return true if the item is in the inventory, false otherwise
077     */
078    public boolean hasItem(final String pName) {
079        return this.aItems.contains(pName);
080    }
081
082    /**
083     * Returns true if the player is carrying at least one item.
084     * @return true if inventory is not empty, false otherwise
085     */
086    public boolean hasItems() {
087        return !this.aItems.isEmpty();
088    }
089
090    /**
091     * Makes the player pick up the given item.
092     * @param pItem the Item to pick up
093     */
094    public boolean pickUp(final Item pItem) {
095        if (this.aCurrentWeight + pItem.getWeight() > this.aMaxWeight) {
096            return false;
097        }
098
099        this.aItems.addItem(pItem);
100        this.aCurrentWeight += pItem.getWeight();
101        return true;
102    }
103
104    /**
105     * Removes and returns the item with the given name from the inventory.
106     * Returns null if the player is not carrying that item.
107     * @param pName the name of the item to drop
108     * @return the dropped Item, or null if not found
109     */
110    public Item drop(final String pName) {
111        Item vDropped = this.aItems.removeItem(pName);
112        if (vDropped != null) {
113            this.aCurrentWeight -= vDropped.getWeight();
114        }
115        return vDropped;
116    }
117
118    /**
119     * Returns a string listing all items carried by the player.
120     * @return a description of the player's inventory
121     */
122    public String getInventoryString() {
123        return this.aItems.getInventoryString();
124    }
125
126    /**
127     * Returns a string describing the current and maximum weight carried by the player.
128     * @return a string representation of the carried weight
129     */
130    public String getWeightString() {
131        return "Weight carried : " + this.aCurrentWeight + "/" + this.aMaxWeight;
132    }
133
134    /**
135     * Updates the player's maximum carrying capacity.
136     * @param pMaxWeight the new maximum weight
137     */
138    public void setMaxWeight(final int pMaxWeight) {
139        this.aMaxWeight = pMaxWeight;
140    }
141
142    /**
143     * Returns the player's maximum carrying capacity.
144     * @return the maximum weight
145     */
146    public int getMaxWeight() {
147        return this.aMaxWeight;
148    }
149}
